textByHashes.b45d80c4111a05a7e30effcaf8b2739e6b38f5df: Arr! Tryin' ter get away eh? Well ye'll never sneak past me, I'm the best lookout this crew has ever seen!
textByHashes.b0fd887c3073fe44e54f9e3bb7f926aaf0fcfd5c: Ye'll have te do better than that, landlubber!
textByHashes.72e4dcc8cd465fad18156277064adce75c590e1d: Hey! What are you doing out there?
textByHashes.1d9c156dd214b725d56f618283af0cde22598ce1: Well Cap'n Donnie said no livin' landlubbers were allowed out of the compound.
textByHashes.5d6606e9896be8f42891a9a81a890a803b44a972: So get yerself back in here, or yer for it!
textByHashes.aa72260c64fa3f3011e616cfc257e347cdbdc5dd: Begone afore I take my cutlass to ye! I've been charged with guardin' this gate and no noodle-armed landlubbers will make it past me alive!
textByHashes.ca14812008af76b1c02567203184bccc2f43f2d6: Ye cheeky begger! I was wavin' my finger at ye!
textByHashes.ce5e0b0b0b003f71296eb6b9f031201d0e86ef90: Arrr... just 'cos me body happens to be 50% wood does not mean I'm heartless.
textByHashes.f9174cff8c795604a419bb856bdf1e52adb29ce1: I got a bag of 'em here. Wanna see?
textByHashes.06ad66bbf58e40a7bbf157cbe2c941d627f54144: That be a tale so heart-wrenchin' that it has so far wrenched the hearts from over a dozen sturdier men than thee!
textByHashes.8905d5c54f17447d2eee73ef43b93c6f73794134: A tale of such woe that none but the stoniest hearts can hear it without sheddin' a single, poignant tear...
textByHashes.8455f1b65e8335c9db2c7848be35ee7f8504ddfb: And I'll never tell ye, not even if ye wore an item, such as a ring, with powers of mind control!
textByHashes.7f148620feeb5ecc9f11289b8328e64d882dd262: Get goin' landlubber before I take my splintery foot to yer behind!
textByHashes.cc59ceb811a1feaf49810b8554eecf94b3815839: Well ye seem like a lad that can handle such a tale...so I'll tell ye...
textByHashes.b939bcc2da27cec6d8d529cb6005555ee1a8e224: Well ye seem like a lass that can handle such a tale...so I'll tell ye...
textByHashes.4177d3372fc7582757b69a9461bc5bc936a682da: Well, it all starts with this albatross...
textByHashes.63de2a9915cfb84dc7ae1e1ce82f1855cc1f083d: Wait, never mind, I'll skip forward a bit.
textByHashes.c4ebc75af598ea67256139e33acad07c0d87e170: I have to lad, Cap'n Donnie will flay what little is left of me if I told ye.
textByHashes.ea7e4bca32030f6f07a9f349f984b0cd5eedc6ca: I have to lass, Cap'n Donnie will flay what little is left of me if I told ye.
textByHashes.3c3d9d2b740126bc964892d8f6514ce46e160351: But anyway, I got recruited to the zombie pirates along with the rest of the crew in an unspecified incident involvin this albatross.
textByHashes.f73d3d1ee66b69df070b1d27869344175a8aea14: We was sailin' along happily, and I was partakin' of a little 'rum' in the crows nest.
textByHashes.d23c4d5a0693f23236d2de52f5b705a64a5c1da0: Well, we hit either a really rough wave or some rocks.
textByHashes.9e70ec52657d2fec8f233a090e66e4f51ba21140: Twas kind of hard for me to tell which, as I was well out of it by then!
textByHashes.d129823e701530cb4f4d79e94108968afa658f98: Regardless I toppled from the crows nest into the water.
textByHashes.d04948b723239b4921339c4531dc4bd9a40a4e22: What happened next was that I discovered a new, previously uncharted reef of hard, spiky coral.
textByHashes.fd0b23998be7d3d20dd0848a130eece5c559842a: I made a mental note of its location, and to this day it is still marked on our fleet's charts as Lukes Reef.
textByHashes.b6627b78b593a51b3fec7f49d9d2c9a801f97a68: I managed to grab a hold of our ship, the Inebriated, as it passed overhead.
textByHashes.5f446e13faef1b32d5f4634548e4280c5fd12a56: And then I discovered another, taller, spikier reef of even sharper and more painful coral.
textByHashes.b8791dc3ec3febba71e59d1c3e70128365df0b88: To this day it is still marked on our fleet's charts as The Other 50% Reef.
textByHashes.2eb25f3c189b74b806e476ac6309d5113bd40a52: When they hauled what was left of me on deck, they dropped me onto the floor while they decided what to do with me.
textByHashes.fa831ec2be409e7a981c22fc9f512f85465b8ffa: Bear in mind this would be on a ghost ship, the planks of which sweat a thick mixture of stagnant water...and pure salt crystals.
textByHashes.4de2221a8747db49c326fd85ed0eba3de5c66da8: But on the good side, all my thrashin' and pained squealin' settled the matter in the Captain's mind, and he had the shipwright carve me half a body out of his Witchwood Planks.
textByHashes.5df25a2a2aba486757a927767986460b56df97db: Tis a special, magical wood from a now extinct tree.
textByHashes.5f5a2ec4cd557b6c712b76e64a5235e3502ea136: Once they nailed it all in place the stuff moves like it is part of me body.
textByHashes.f05f75dd840a8d3d19a68274e526d8af6a0eef70: The stuff will also grow back if it breaks, which is dead handy!
textByHashes.d3fa6602fc98608fe315177af9f7bee0ddf95f0d: So, that be the tale of how I managed to lose precisely 50% of my body.
textByHashes.de8431e7abe0377ff6ae09981b4a9380fe733ecd: What kind of a question is that?
textByHashes.015ddc90ad4b5072fed3def01bf27a11e6820d05: Don't make me angry! Ye'll not like me when I'm angry!
textByHashes.057595882876095adeffec2e1121875a5385cc9a: Let that be a lesson to ye!
textByHashes.85c6abf360ecb3cdb934ca610f8ce1c3502ce7f6: Hah! I'm one step ahead of ye!
textByHashes.e7231fa029fdb9c05a2a4abe8d14831fe65f86f1: The Cap'n would have me whittled down to toothpicks if I did.
textByHashes.ae3d9f5206537574e13b08831aa3674bff680802: Look, lad I'm not tellin' ye a thing! So clear out while ye still can!
textByHashes.ad9da5b6166e8a0e01615016f043b30024989b34: Look, lass I'm not tellin' ye a thing! So clear out while ye still can!
